description_long: This house features a modern, low-profile design with a predominantly flat roof and clean, angular lines. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, with a large main section and an elongated wing extending from one side. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, complemented by green landscaping elements that suggest a lawn or garden area. Large horizontal windows are visible, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house appears to have multiple entry points, with the main entrance likely located at the end of the elongated wing, possibly featuring a covered entryway. The overall layout suggests a spacious, open-plan interior with a focus on outdoor connectivity.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with clean lines, large windows, and an elongated wing, set amidst landscaped green areas.
description_view_0: Front-facing view showing the elongated wing and main entry area, with visible green landscaping and layered roof sections.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, rectangular wing and expansive flat roof, with large horizontal windows and green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad main section of the house, flat roof, and minimal window openings, with landscaping wrapping around.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the connection between the main volume and the wing, with visible entry features and green areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is recessed and likely covered, with minimalistic door design and possible steps or a small porch.

license_info.creator_display_name: The Center for Digital Humanities UArizona
